unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: You can soon cook for your family.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: s + oon，很快就到中午 (noon)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Books can open your mind and make you think.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: m + ind，我的 (mine) 头脑 (mind)。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: v. & n. 进入; 掉落; 跌倒
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Come to the library on Tuesdays after school and fall in love with books!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: f + all，所有人都跌倒了。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What club do you want to join?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: cl + ub，一群人聚在一起的地方。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Hello! I want to join the ping-pong club.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: joi (喜悦) + n，加入带来喜悦。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: How do you choose a school club?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: ch + oose，挑选鹅 (goose) 一样仔细。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 戏剧; 戏剧表演
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: My name is Lin Hua, and I want to join the drama club.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: dra (拉) + ma (妈)，拉着妈妈看戏剧。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Can you read with feeling?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: feel (感觉) + ing，正在感受的情感。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Here's some good news!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: new (新的) + s，新的事情就是新闻。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 音乐的; 有音乐天赋的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I can't play any musical instruments.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: music (音乐) + al (的)，音乐的。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adv. 正是如此; 准确地
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Exactly! How about Ella?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: exact (精确的) + ly，完全正确。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I can play the drums.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: dr + um，咚咚打鼓的声音。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Circle can or can't with your own information.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: able (能够) + ity (名词后缀)，能够做事的力量。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: v. 用颜料画; 在……上刷油漆
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I can paint well.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: p + aint，用颜料 paint 画一幅画。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: A cat can climb trees.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: clim + b (不发音)，像爬山一样b无声。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She can do so much more.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: m + ore，更多 (more) 矿石 (ore)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I'm good at telling stories. I often act out stories with my brother at home.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: a + ct，行动起来！

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I'm interested in nature.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: interest (兴趣) + ed，人对事物有兴趣。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 自然界; 大自然
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I'm interested in nature. I love hiking.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: na (那) + ture，那里的自然风光真美。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Mapo tofu, beef noodles, jiaozi, baozi... You name it!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: bee (蜜蜂) + f，蜜蜂不吃牛肉。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We watch birds, take photos, and collect plants and insects.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: col (共同) + lect (选择)，共同选择 = 收集。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We watch birds, take photos, and collect plants and insects.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: in + sect (切)，身体分节的小虫子。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Discover wildlife right under your nose!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: dis (去掉) + cover (遮盖)，去掉遮盖 = 发现。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 野生动物; 野生生物
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Discover wildlife right under your nose!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: wild (野生的) + life (生命)，野外的生命。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Can you play Chinese chess?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: play (玩) + Chinese chess (中国象棋)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I can't play any musical instruments.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: musical (音乐的) + instrument (器具) = 乐器。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I often act out stories with my brother at home.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: act (行动) + out (出来)，把故事演出来。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I often act out stories with my brother at home.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: at (在) + home (家)，在家里。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I'm really interested in reading all kinds of books.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: interested (感兴趣的) + in (在)，对...产生兴趣。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Come to the library on Tuesdays after school and fall in love with books!
unit_vocabulary.comparison: fall in love vs fall asleep
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: fall (掉入) + in love with (爱中)，陷入爱中。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We watch birds, take photos, and collect plants and insects.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: take (拿) + photos (照片)，拿着相机拍照。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It's more than reading.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: more (更多) + than (比)，多于。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Oh, but you can sing well.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: s + ing，唱着歌前进 (sing)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Sure. I can play the guitar.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: gui + tar，弹吉他的声音。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She can play the violin, right?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: vio + lin，优美的琴声。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I can't cook, but I love great food. I want to cook for my family.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: c + ook，看着 book (书) 学 cook (做饭)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Now I'm brave enough to talk, and even sing, in front of lots of people.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: br + ave，勇敢地面对波浪 (wave)。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 害羞的; 腼腆的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I'm usually very shy, but when I'm in a play, I no longer feel afraid.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: sh + y，害羞地嘘 (sh) 一声。
